# Security Policy

If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in this repository, do not open a public issue.

Please email wabbit@wabbit.one with:

- a concise description of the issue
- affected versions, commits, or environments
- reproduction details or a proof of concept
- any suggested mitigation, if known

We will acknowledge receipt and follow up privately.

Repository: https://github.com/wabbit-corp/repo-template
